title: Practo Advisory Limited is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Practo Advisory Limited is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Practo Advisory Limited family as a Full Stack Developer in Allahabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Practo Advisory Limited:
Practo Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Practo Advisory Limited!
